title: clerodendrum cephalanthum
intro: Clerodendrum cephalanthum, also known as the 'Ushinosagi', is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum cephalanthum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various health conditions.
